cms.title: Website CMS

cms.noLinks: No custom links — published pages marked "show in nav" appear automatically.

propertyIntel.title: Property Intelligence
propertyIntel.subtitle: Turn any listing into a full investment report in under 60 seconds
propertyIntel.formError: Could not start the analysis — check the inputs.
propertyIntel.formRequired: Address, city, asking price and square feet are required.
propertyIntel.emptyHint: Enter a property and our multi-agent engine returns an investment score, fair value, cash flow, risk and a negotiation plan.
propertyIntel.crewWorking: The crew is analyzing this property
propertyIntel.crewWorkingHint: Comparable sales, rental income, neighborhood, strategy and market agents are running in parallel.
propertyIntel.grounded: Answers grounded in this report's data
propertyIntel.q2: Why is it priced this way?

quotations.subtitle: Build branded quotes and proposals, send them, and track acceptance
quotations.emptyHint: Pick a real-estate template — listing package, buyer representation, closing estimate — or start blank.
quotations.selectHint: Choose a quote to preview it, export a branded PDF, send it, or mark it accepted.
quotations.title: Quote title
quotations.required: Title, client name and at least one line item are required.

invoicing.title: Invoicing & Payments
invoicing.subtitle: Bill clients, track payments, and get paid faster
invoicing.emptyHint: Invoice a client directly, or convert an accepted quote into an invoice.
invoicing.selectHint: Preview an invoice, record a payment, share a client link, or export a PDF.

deals.title: Deal Pipeline
deals.subtitle: Track every transaction from lead to closed — with commission forecasting

ledger.title: Commission & Expense Ledger
ledger.subtitle: Your income and expenses in one place, with a monthly P&L

documents.title: Documents & E-sign
documents.subtitle: Send agreements and disclosures — clients sign online
documents.bodyPlaceholder: Document text — pick a template above or type your own…
documents.emptyHint: Start from a listing agreement, buyer representation, disclosure, or addendum template.
documents.selectHint: Preview it, send it for e-signature, and share the signing link.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is your business at a glance

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Every lead, answered in seconds
leads.emptyHint: Point your Zillow, Facebook, and website forms at your intake webhook — new leads get an instant reply automatically.

studio.title: Agent Studio
studio.name: Agent name
studio.firstMessage: First message (what the agent says first)
studio.knowledge: Knowledge base (attach docs to this agent)
studio.noKnowledge: No documents yet — add them in the Knowledge base below.

kb.title: Knowledge base
kb.hint: Give your agents the facts — listings, financing, policies, FAQs. They answer from these and never make things up (RAG).
kb.uploadFormats: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, CSV, HTML — up to 15MB
kb.urlPh: Paste a web page URL to import…
kb.docContentPh: Paste anything: listing details, commission structure, neighbourhood guides, objection handling…
kb.globalPromptPh: Applies to every voice agent — brand tone, do's and don'ts, disclosures…
kb.testPh: e.g. what areas do you cover?
kb.noResults: No matching facts found. Add a document above.

demo.speaker: Speaker on/off
demo.noMic: Voice input isn't supported in this browser — use the keyboard button to type.
demo.paused: Mic muted — tap the mic to talk
demo.trouble: Sorry, I had trouble hearing that — could you say it again?
demo.fallbackGreeting: Hi there, thanks for taking my call! How can I help you today?
demo.tapInterrupt: Talk any time to interrupt — or tap to cut in
demo.insecure: Live voice needs a secure (https) connection. Deployed on Vercel/Render it works automatically.
demo.typeToTalk: This browser can't hear you (no speech recognition) — type your reply and the agent speaks back.

voice.title: Voice Agents
voice.subtitle: Your 24/7 multilingual calling team
voice.tryInBrowser: Talk to this agent in the browser (no phone)
voice.engineHint: Pick the AI brain and voice your agents use on calls — changes apply to new calls instantly.
voice.testHint: Enter your number and we'll call you right now so you can hear the agent live.
voice.testInbound: Or call this number to test the inbound agent: {{number}}
voice.testNoInbound: No inbound number yet — add a Twilio or Vapi number in Settings to receive real calls. Calls run in safe simulation until then.
voice.noCallsHint: Trigger a qualifier call from any lead — the agent qualifies, books, and logs the transcript here.

followup.title: Follow-up Autopilot
followup.subtitle: Sequences that never forget a lead
followup.emptyHint: Create a sequence and every new lead can be nurtured automatically across SMS, WhatsApp, and email.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: WhatsApp, SMS & email in one place

leadEngine.title: Lead Engine
leadEngine.subtitle: Fresh prospects on demand
leadEngine.emptyHint: Scrape FSBO, expired listings, or Google Maps areas — validated prospects flow straight into your pipeline.
leadEngine.personasHint: One-click templates for the top real-estate prospect types. Pick one, choose a city, go.

content.title: Content Studio
content.subtitle: Captions, posts and video on autopilot
content.pendingReview: Publishing pending Meta App Review — scheduled posts are logged by the stub adapter.

agents.title: AI Team
agents.subtitle: 20 specialists working your pipeline
agents.standingBy: All agents standing by — trigger anything and watch them light up
agents.activityHint: Every message, call, scrape, and decision your agents make — as it happens.
agents.noActivity: Nothing yet. Add a lead, start a scrape, or ask the team — activity shows up here live.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Pick the modules you pay for
billing.noPermission: Only an account owner or admin can change the plan. Ask a teammate with those permissions, or sign in as the owner.
billing.mockNote: Stripe key not set — plan changes apply instantly in test mode.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Account, compliance & integrations
settings.providersHint: Click a provider, paste its API key, save — it goes live instantly. No key? It runs in safe test mode.
settings.keySet: A key is saved — paste a new one to replace it
settings.whereKey: Where do I find this key?

assistant.title: TrueCode AI Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Type or speak — your agents do the work
assistant.snapshot: I'm watching your account: {{total}} leads total, {{week}} new this week, {{appts}} appointments booked. Ask me anything about it.
assistant.intro: Tell me what you want done — I'll route it to the right agent and you can watch it happen live. I can chain steps too: "find luxury buyers in Miami and email them".
assistant.error: That didn't work — try rephrasing, or say "help" to see what I can do.

welcome.title: Welcome to TrueCode AI OS
welcome.body: Think of it as a team of tireless robot helpers for your real-estate business. They answer leads, make calls, follow up, and find new clients — while you watch it all happen live.

leads.title: Every lead answered in seconds
leads.body: When someone asks about a home, your robot replies instantly by text — day or night. Fast replies win deals.

voice.title: AI that talks on the phone
voice.body: Your voice agents call new leads, ask the right questions, and book appointments — in 5 languages. You get the transcript.

leadEngine.title: Find new clients on demand
leadEngine.body: Pick who you want (luxury buyers, FSBO sellers, investors…), pick a city, press go. Fresh prospects flow into your pipeline.

agents.title: Watch your AI team work
agents.body: This page shows every agent and what it's doing right now — glowing green means working. Give the team a goal and watch them decide.

assistant.title: Just say what you want
assistant.body: Press the sparkle button (or Alt+K) and type — or tap the mic and speak. "Call Maria", "find investors in Dubai", "go to settings". Done.

keys.title: Connect your accounts
keys.body: In Settings, paste API keys for Twilio, WhatsApp and more. No keys yet? Everything still works in safe test mode so you can explore.

language.title: Speak any language
language.body: Switch the whole dashboard between English, Spanish, Arabic, Portuguese and Haitian Creole from here — anytime.

auth.name: Your name
auth.welcome: Run your entire real estate business on autopilot
auth.tagline: Answer every lead in seconds. Qualify by AI voice. Follow up forever.

common.lockedHint: This module is not in your current plan.
